task_completion.description: Create a new style named 'cities_sorted' in the 'ne' workspace
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GeoServer Styles page or Style Editor, the name field should be 'cities_sorted' and the workspace dropdown should be set to 'ne'.

task_completion.description: Configure a PointSymbolizer with a red (#FF0000) circle
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SLD XML editor, look for a <PointSymbolizer> containing a <Mark> with <WellKnownName>circle</WellKnownName> and a fill <CssParameter name="fill">#FF0000</CssParameter>.
In the SLD XML editor, look for <Size>10</Size> within the <Graphic> tag of the PointSymbolizer.

task_completion.description: Include the 'sortBy' VendorOption for the 'pop_max' attribute
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SLD XML editor, look for <VendorOption name="sortBy">pop_max</VendorOption> (or 'pop_max A' for ascending) inside the <FeatureTypeStyle> tag.

task_completion.description: Associate the style with the 'ne:ne_populated_places' layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GeoServer Edit Layer page for 'ne_populated_places', under the 'Publishing' tab, the 'Default Style' dropdown should be set to 'cities_sorted' (or 'ne:cities_sorted').

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser to access GeoServer
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigated to http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/ rather than terminal curl commands.

integrity.description: Agent entered the SLD into the GeoServer Style Editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The SLD XML should be visible inside the GeoServer web interface's style editor text area, not just in a standalone text editor.

integrity.description: Agent used the GeoServer GUI to associate the style with the layer
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GeoServer Layer Publishing tab being interacted with to select the new style.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected style name is 'cities_sorted' in the 'ne' workspace. The SLD must contain a PointSymbolizer with a circle mark, fill color '#FF0000' (red), and size '10'. It must also include <VendorOption name="sortBy">pop_max</VendorOption> (or 'pop_max A' for ascending) to ensure smaller populations are drawn first, placing larger cities on top. Finally, this style must be linked to the 'ne_populated_places' layer in GeoServer.
